description: As a Compliance Officer, remediate five Oracle database user accounts flagged for excessive privileges. Revoke the DBA role from DEV_USER; revoke CREATE TABLE and SELECT ANY TABLE from REPORT_USER2; revoke RESOURCE and UNLIMITED TABLESPACE from APP_USER; lock LEGACY_USER; and ensure ANALYST_USER has only CREATE SESSION and CREATE VIEW privileges. Create and enable an Oracle Unified Audit policy named PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION_AUDIT covering GRANT ANY PRIVILEGE, CREATE USER, DROP USER, ALTER USER, and CREATE ROLE. Export a security remediation report documenting the findings and fixes for each account to /home/ga/Documents/exports/security_remediation.txt.
